styles.name: Clean Light Learning UI
styles.prompt: Use a bright off-white or white background, black or near-black primary text, generous spacing, crisp cards, one restrained blue or green accent, and no low-contrast gray labels. Aim for Apple-like clarity and readable learning-app UI.

styles.name: Academic Editorial
styles.prompt: Use an academic editorial style with cream paper background, dark ink typography, subtle rules, diagram annotations, and a calm scholarly palette. Keep formulas and labels large, legible, and precise.

styles.name: Business Dashboard
styles.prompt: Use a polished business presentation style: light neutral background, navy or charcoal headings, compact KPI cards, precise chart geometry, thin grid lines, and one premium accent color. Avoid playful colors and avoid tiny axis labels.

styles.name: Colorful Student
styles.prompt: Use a friendly colorful style with pastel panels, bold readable headings, rounded shapes, playful but controlled accents, and clear visual hierarchy. Keep backgrounds light enough that text remains very readable.

styles.name: Premium Dark Contrast
styles.prompt: Use a dark premium interface only if contrast stays excellent: near-black background, white primary text, bright cyan or amber accents, visible grid/diagram strokes, and no essential text below 80% opacity.

styles.name: Mobile Learning Card
styles.prompt: Use a mobile-first card style with safe margins, large tap-target-like panels, strong title hierarchy, readable body copy, rounded containers, and a clear final state suitable for a learning app artifact.
